root_cause: ECS task CPU limit (0.5 vCPU) insufficient for request processing
error_message: High CPU utilization causing request timeouts
resolution: Increased task CPU to 1 vCPU and enabled auto-scaling
fix_commands: aws ecs update-service --cluster production --service api-backend --task-definition api-backend:2 --force-new-deployment
preventive_measures: Right-size tasks based on load testing
